# Building a BugBot

There are two ways to get a BugBot:

<div class="grid cards" markdown>

-   **Full Kit**

    ---

    Everything included — boards, motors, chassis, wheels, battery, and hardware.
    Skip straight to assembly.

    [:octicons-arrow-right-24: Assemble the kit](assembly.md)

-   **Board Only**

    ---

    You have a Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32-S3 Sense and need to source the rest.
    Start with the parts list, then 3D print the chassis parts, then assemble.

    [:octicons-arrow-right-24: Parts list](parts-list.md)

</div>

---

## What's in each path

| | Full kit | Board only |
|---|:---:|:---:|
| XIAO ESP32-S3 Sense | ✅ included | ✅ you have this |
| XIAO ESP32-C3 dongle | ✅ included | 🛒 buy |
| BugBot PCB | ✅ included | 🛒 buy |
| Motors + wheels | ✅ included | 🛒 buy |
| Battery + cable | ✅ included | 🛒 buy |
| Screws + standoffs | ✅ included | 🛒 buy |
| 3D-printed chassis parts | ✅ included | 🖨️ print |
| Soldering required | ❌ no | ❌ no |
